simp [h₀, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
  · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := by simpa [h₀] using Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.mod_lt _ (by decide : 0 < p))
    field_simp [h₁]
    ring

  split_ifs with h₀ <;> simp_all [h₀]

exact h
      field_simp [hinv]
      ring

split_ifs with h
    · simp [h]
    · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₁
        apply h
        exact h₁
      have h₂ : ((Z + Y) % p * Nat.modInv ((Z - Y) % p) p) % p * (Z - Y) % p = (Z + Y) % p := by
        rw [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mul_mod]
        rw [Nat.modInv_mul_self_eq_one h₁]
        simp [Nat.mul_mod]
      simp [h₂]

split_ifs with h

    · rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (show p > 0 from by decide)]

      rw [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod]
      apply Eq.symm

      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt _ (show p > 0 from by decide)

  use h.mp

    exact Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h₀)
  · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₁
      apply h₀
      exact h₁
    have h₂ : ((Z + Y) % p * Nat.gcdA ((Z - Y) % p) p) % p = (Z + Y) % p := by
      sorry
    sorry

rw [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.sub_mod, h₂]
      field_simp [h₁]
      <;> omega

simp [h₀]
  · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₁
      apply h₀
      exact h₁
    have h₂ : ((Z - Y) % p).gcd p = 1 := by
      apply Nat.gcd_eq_right
      apply Nat.mod_lt
      exact (show 0 < p from by decide)
    have h₃ : ((Z - Y) % p).invert p = ((Z - Y) % p) ^ (p - 2) % p := by
      apply Nat.invert_eq_pow_sub_two
      exact (show 1 < p from by decide)
    rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (show p > 0 from by decide)]
    simp [h₃, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.sub_mod, h₁]
    ring_nf
    omega

cases h : to_montgomery e <;> simp_all
  use h.mp
  simp [h, Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat]
  split_ifs with h₀
  · rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] <;> try norm_num
    -- Handle the case when Z ≡ Y (mod p)
    -- In this case, the implementation returns 0
    sorry
  · -- Handle the case when Z ≢ Y (mod p)
    -- Then u = (Z + Y) * (Z - Y)⁻¹ mod p
    sorry

    · have := invert_spec (Z - Y)

<;> simp_all [Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, p]

apply em
  cases' h₁ with h h <;> simp [h]

simp_all [Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, to_montgomery]
    split_ifs with h₀
    · simp_all [h₀]
    · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₁
        apply h₀
        exact h₁
      simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      rw [← Nat.mod_add_div (Z + Y) p, ← Nat.mod_add_div (Z - Y) p]
      simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      have h₂ : ((Z - Y) % p).invert p = ((Z - Y) % p).gcdA p := by
        simp [Nat.invert, Nat.gcdA]
      simp_all [h₂, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]

split_ifs with h
    · rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) (Nat.lt_of_succ_le p_pos))]
      simp [h, to_montgomery_raw, Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, p]
    · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := h
      have h₂ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 → (Z - Y).invert % p = (Z - Y) ^ (p - 2) % p := by
        intro hne
        exact Nat.invert_eq_pow_sub_two (by linarith) hne
      simp [to_montgomery_raw, Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, p, h₁, h₂]
      ring_nf
      omega

-- which computes u as (Z+Y) * (Z-Y).invert, and .invert returns 0 when input is 0
        sorry
      split_ifs with h₀
      · rw [h, h₀]
        simp [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      · rw [h, h₀]
        have h₁ : (Z - Y).invert % p = (Z - Y)⁻¹ % p := by
          -- In the field implementation, .invert coincides with modular inverse when nonzero
          sorry
        rw [h₁, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.sub_mod]
        -- Now we have u ≡ (Z+Y) * (Z-Y)⁻¹ (mod p), so multiplying both sides by (Z-Y)
        -- gives u * (Z-Y) ≡ (Z+Y) (mod p)
        sorry
    | err _ => contradiction

sorry

split_ifs with h
    · rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) (Nat.lt_of_succ_le p_pos))]
      simp [h, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
    · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := h
      have h₂ : ((Z - Y) % p : ℤ) ≠ 0 := by omega

    · rw [FieldElement.invert_eq_zero_of_eq_zero] <;> assumption
    · have : (e.Z - e.Y).invert * (e.Z - e.Y) = 1 := FieldElement.invert_mul_self h

exact Nat.mod_ne_zero_of_lt (by linarith [p_pos])
        exact hcond

cases h : to_montgomery e <;> simp_all
  use h.mp
  simp [h, Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, to_montgomery]
  split_ifs with h₀
  · rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] <;> try norm_num
    -- When Z ≡ Y (mod p), the implementation returns 0
    -- This follows from the definition of invert in the underlying field
    sorry
  · -- When Z ≢ Y (mod p), we have u = (Z + Y) * (Z - Y)⁻¹ mod p
    -- Hence u * (Z - Y) ≡ (Z + Y) mod p
    sorry

simp_all [h]
  split_ifs with h₁ <;> simp_all [h₁]

simp [Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, to_montgomery, h₀]
  · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₁
      apply h₀
      exact h₁
    simp [Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, to_montgomery, h₁]
    ring

try
      { omega }

-- When Z ≡ Y (mod p), the implementation returns 0
    rfl
  · -- When Z ≢ Y (mod p), we have u = (Z+Y) * (Z-Y)⁻¹ mod p
    -- which implies u * (Z-Y) ≡ (Z+Y) mod p
    have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := h₀
    have h₂ : ((Z + Y) % p * (Z - Y) % p).invert % p = (Z + Y) % p * ((Z - Y) % p).invert % p := by
      rfl
    rw [← Nat.mul_mod, ← Nat.mul_mod]
    simp [h₁, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.sub_mod]

simp_all [to_montgomery, Field51_as_Nat, U8x32_as_Nat, p]
  split_ifs with h₁ <;> simp_all

use mp
    constructor
    · rfl
    · simp [h]
      split_ifs with h₀
      · rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (show p > 0 by decide)]
        simp [h₀]
      · have h₁ : (Z - Y) % p ≠ 0 := by
          intro h₁
          apply h₀
          exact h₁
        rw [← Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (show p > 0 by decide)] at *
        simp_all [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.add_mod, Nat.sub_mod]
  | err _ => contradiction
